title: RESOLUTION 2 — Mama explains: it's Eva's birthday helmet!
_realFamilyLore: Real-life Eva just got a 2-wheel bike (Apr 2026). The birthday helmet payoff connects to her actual milestone. Watch parents will love.
prompt: Medium shot in @bedroom-sisters. @Mama appears in the bedroom doorway, smiles big when she sees the helmet. She walks over and kneels next to @Eva on the RIGHT, putting one hand gently on Eva's shoulder. @Sara stands on the LEFT, smiling. Mama (warm, proud): "Eva, that's YOUR new helmet!" Eva (jaw drops, eyes huge): "REALLY?!" Mama: "For your two-wheel bike!" Eva (bouncing on her toes): "REALLY-REALLY?!" Warm golden light, big-reveal Pixar moment.
